ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer (Last, First) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact attempt */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer related to this contact */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the contact attempt */,
  "contact_time" TEXT /* Time of the contact attempt */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Method used for contacting the customer (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the contact attempt */,
  "contact_result" TEXT /* Result of the contact attempt (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "contacted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_contacted_by FOREIGN KEY ("contacted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer related to this follow-up */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date scheduled for the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_time" TEXT /* Time scheduled for the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_method" TEXT /* Method of follow-up (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the follow-up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the follow-up */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the follow-up record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the follow-up record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., customer engagement, sales summary) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
